title: Conversational Noise Robustness

summaryCharacteristics: Mentions task assignment to Rajeev to fix the login bug tomorrow
Ignores conversational stutters, uh, um, filler words, and like

requiredActions.evidence: Rajeev: Oh, right. Yeah, that's, uh, the login bug. I... I can, like, probably, you know, take a look at it... uh, tomorrow morning.

requiredEvidencePhrases: Rajeev: Oh, right. Yeah, that's, uh, the login bug. I... I can, like, probably, you know, take a look at it... uh, tomorrow morning.
prohibitedOutputCharacteristics: Including filler words ('like', 'um', 'uh', 'you know') in the action description or summary

scoringNotes: Verify that the model successfully resolves the action item despite the highly disfluent, stuttered phrasing.
assumptions: Linguistic disfluency must be sanitized by the extraction logic.
